task.title: Decide and codify simple catch-clause compaction style
task.summary: Simple `catch {|err| ... }` clauses currently compact into a dense ending like `} catch {|err| print ... } }`, which the review found readable enough to parse but visually poor.
task.problem: This is a non-breaking style question. We need a definitive answer on whether simple catch closures should compact inline, whether the trailing block close should stay separated, or whether catch clauses should prefer a multiline style even for short bodies.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Choose one policy for short catch clauses and encode it in regression tests.
The chosen output for the configure-apps.nu catch shape is explicit and stable.
The policy distinguishes catch formatting from the separate multistatement-closure rules when necessary.
